author: SantiMod
content:
@here The Atlas Brew #28 - Scream Combat is starting in 5 minutes! 

This week's topic is SCREAM Combat: How should loot be distributed after a large battle? If three factions are present, and the starbase gets destroyed, who should get ownership of the star system? 3 way battles, how should they work? What if the third just joins the attack/defense? And more!!  

Join us in the ⁠🔊┃Atlas Brew Lounge
